calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioners: Xiao Ling Zhao and Xiao Bing Cui, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ya Xin Cui, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Li Hong Tan.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nelson Ng.
Decree signed in open court.
